name: Watercress-Olive Tea Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1 2 oz jar pimiento-stuffed olives, drained and finely chopped
6 slices Pullman loaf (egg or white bread)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the whole Pullman loaf horizontally to obtain long, rectangular slices.
2. Whip softened butter until light and fluffy.
3. Combine cream cheese, watercress, and olives. Blend thoroughly.
4. Spread a thin layer of whipped butter on the bread slices.
5. Spread a generous layer of the cream cheese mixture on half of the buttered bread slices.
6. Cover with the remaining slices, sandwich-style.
7. Wrap the sandwiches in foil and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
8. Trim the crusts and cut into finger, triangular, or rectangular shapes.
9. Arrange on a platter and refrigerate until serving time. Serve chilled.
Makes from 27 to 96 sandwiches, depending on size and shape.
